Author: Bancho
Name: Hrothgar Scent
Description: A nearby-player list where every row shows whether that player is targeting you, with a watcher history and alerts.
Punchline: Hrothgar smell you. Hrothgar know who watching.
Changelog: First release. A nearby-player list and a who-is-targeting-you detector in one window: every row carries an eye showing whether that player is looking at you, and watchers can sort to the top. Keeps a watcher history with timestamps and visit counts, and can alert you in chat or with a sound when someone new locks on. Filter by name, distance, race, level, party, friends and an ignore list; keep a focus list of people you care about and get told when they turn up. Sortable, hideable columns that remember their layout, a minimal HUD mode, and a server info bar count. Hides itself in PvP.
